summary: Video. Cardell Morant, Director of the DHS Center for Countering Human Trafficking, speaks direct-to-camera against a blue curtain with a lower-third name plate and subtitles, describing the Center's anti-trafficking work. It is a static, speech-driven institutional informational message with no music.
notable_text: Lower third 'CARDELL MORANT, DIRECTOR, CENTER FOR COUNTERING HUMAN TRAFFICKING'; DHS Blue Campaign
